title: UW–Madison’s Unal recieves Early Childhood Champion Award
summary_en: Cigdem Unal received the Early Childhood Champion Award from the National Coalition for Campus Children's Centers (N4C) at the 2026 national conference.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校奇格德姆·乌纳尔荣获全国校园儿童中心联盟“幼儿教育先锋奖”

title: School of Education’s Michael Apple named to American Academy of Arts & Sciences
summary_en: A professor emeritus in the School of Education was elected this week to the American Academy of Arts & Sciences, a national honorary society and research center.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教育学院教授迈克尔·阿普尔当选美国艺术与科学院院士

title: Karumbaiah brings research on AI in education to New York
summary_en: School of Education faculty member Shamya Karumbaiah will share her research on artificial intelligence in education at the Wisconsin Alumni Association’s UW Now event in New York City on Tuesday, April 28.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校学者将在纽约校友活动上分享教育领域人工智能研究成果

title: Researchers at UW–Madison receive major grant to study the link between mental health and the microbiome
summary_en: Researchers at UW–Madison have received a major grant to study how the gut microbiome may influence depression, launching an international project that will examine biological, genetic, and behavioral data across cohorts in the United States and Singapore.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究人员获大额拨款开展心理健康与微生物组关联研究

title: UW–Madison’s Li named Wisconsin Academy Fellow
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Li Chiao-Ping has been named a 2026 Fellow of the Wisconsin Academy of Sciences, Arts & Letters.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校李巧萍教授获评2026年度威斯康星科学、艺术与文学学院院士

title: Article from UW–Madison’s Turner offers new framework for justice-oriented public education in a multiracial democracy
summary_en: A new article by Erica O. Turner, associate professor in the Department of Educational Policy Studies at UW–Madison, offers a timely rethinking of what educational justice for all should look like in today’s multiracial democracy.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校学者发表文章提出多种族民主下公正导向公共教育新框架

title: UW–Madison entomology research to anchor new learning game
summary_en: UW–Madison entomology professor Claudio Gratton had wanted to make an educational video game about insects for years. He believed a game would be an incredible way to engage young learners with the important research he does on insect diversity.
title_cn: UW–Madison entomology research to anchor new learning game
